name: code-server
description: Run VS Code on your Umbrel
compose:
name: slashnode-code-server
services:
  server:
    image: codercom/code-server:4.126.0
    container_name: code-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - server_data:/home/coder
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8091:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-code-server_server_data
